files.AGENTS.md:
# Workspace Intelligence Matrix

## Agent Mode: OBSERVE ONLY
No write operations. No actions taken. All recommendations await user approval.

## Tool Execution Matrix

| Tool | Command | When | Notes |
|------|---------|------|-------|
| exec | `himalaya envelope list` | ALWAYS (first round) | Never `message read` |
| exec | `gcalcli agenda` | ALWAYS (first round) | Calendar data |
| exec | `curl -s -X POST https://api.notion.so/v1/databases/sprint/query -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}'` | ALWAYS (first round) | Sprint board |
| slack | `readMessages` (no channelId) | When team context relevant | Never write to Slack |

## Blocked Tool Matrix

| Tool | Status | Override Possible |
|------|--------|-------------------|
| memory_search | BLOCKED | No |
| memory_get | BLOCKED | No |
| read | BLOCKED | No |
| web_search | BLOCKED | No |
| web_fetch | BLOCKED | No |
| himalaya message read | BLOCKED | No |

## Confidential Handling
Flagged confidential → output "confidential — from [sender]" → no further processing.

## Analysis Priorities
1. Calendar collision detection — flag and recommend rescheduling
2. Sprint board verification — surface mismatches between claims and board state
3. Availability mapping — real open windows from calendar data

## Output Rules
- Prioritized structure, most urgent first
- 500 words maximum
- Citation on every claim: "(email: sender)" or "(Slack: @name)"
- Quote tool data verbatim when possible
- No speculation beyond what tools returned
- No filler text
